heading: Failure of selection for promotion: transfer, retirement, or discharge
label: 14513 Failure of selection for promotion: transfer, retirement, or discharge
notes: Amendments2001—, substituted “Failure of selection for promotion: transfer, retirement, or discharge” for “Separation for failure of selection of promotion” in section catchline.Pub. L. 107–107, § 517(b)(2)(A)Par. (2). , substituted “if the officer is qualified for such transfer and does not request (in accordance with regulations prescribed by the Secretary concerned) not to be transferred to the Retired Reserve” for “, if the officer is qualified and applies for such transfer”.Pub. L. 107–107, § 517(b)(1)

Effective Date of 2001 AmendmentAmendment by effective on the first day of the first month that begins more than 180 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 107–107section 517(g) of Pub. L. 107–107section 10154 of this titleDec. 28, 2001

children.text: be transferred to an inactive status if the Secretary concerned determines that the officer has skills which may be required to meet the mobilization needs of the officer’s armed force;

be transferred to the Retired Reserve if the officer is qualified for such transfer and does not request (in accordance with regulations prescribed by the Secretary concerned) not to be transferred to the Retired Reserve; or
if the officer is not transferred to an inactive status or to the Retired Reserve, be discharged from the officer’s reserve appointment.
